Partners

HubSpot, structured for how your business actually works

HubSpot should not be a repository of activity. It should be the infrastructure that makes selling, measuring and deciding easier.

Consultar Rotata Soluciones
01

Context

Context

HubSpot becomes powerful when the business structure underneath it is clear. Without that structure, the platform simply exposes confusion faster.

01

Current operating context

02

Commercial process reality

03

Data and CRM dependency

02

Friction

Problem

Teams often buy HubSpot expecting clarity, but import messy data, unclear stages, duplicated fields and workflows that mirror old habits.

01

Messy data

02

Unclear ownership

03

Weak visibility

04

Manual follow-up

03

System layer

What Rotata does

We structure HubSpot around the real commercial process: data model, lifecycle stages, pipelines, workflows, lists, dashboards and handoffs.

Diagnose

Map the current setup and identify structural blockers.

Design

Define the operating model, data rules and conversion path.

Implement

Configure the system in tools the team already uses.

Measure

Connect dashboards and feedback loops to business decisions.

04

Proof

Outcomes

HubSpot should make decisions easier: who to prioritize, what changed, what sales needs, and where pipeline is blocked.

01

Cleaner data

02

Clearer prioritization

03

Better handoffs

04

More useful reporting

05

Operating model

When it is relevant

This matters when HubSpot exists but reporting is weak, automation is inconsistent, sales adoption is low or leadership cannot trust the data.

01

CRM adoption problems

02

Pipeline visibility issues

03

Sales and marketing misalignment

04

Growth activity without a system

06

Process

System integration

HubSpot connects to the wider growth system: acquisition, outbound, account intelligence, analytics and reporting rhythm.

01

Tool

02

System

03

Outcome

Structure this system

Consulta

Rotata turns fragmented revenue operations into one operating model that marketing and sales can read, run and improve.
